Mon, October 9th, 2023

•

Today I started using Nexus!

•

What is Nexus?

-

A thought-capture tool built to mimic the human brain.

-

We recall concepts through connections. Nexus creates a web of ideas automatically.

-

Eventually, you achieve total recall. Nexus serves as your digital memory.
